Jun 12, 2018 CONTENTS: SUN Solaris Operating System SUN Solaris Operating System ---------------------------- The SUN Solaris operating system is no longer running on any EECS Instructional computers. It was our predominant UNIX opera

onal computers. It was our predominant UNIX operating system until Fall 2016. Our WEB server (http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu) was converted from Solaris X86 to Ubuntu Linux in 2017. This has implications for CGI programs that our users a

implications for CGI programs that our users are running on the WEB server (see http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/setup.html#features). The CGI scripts may need modification to run on Linux instead of Solaris. All of our UNIX systems are now

ead of Solaris. All of our UNIX systems are now running Linux (Ubuntu or Centos). For the names and locations of these computers, please see http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/labs Instructional Support Group 378/386 Cory, 333 Soda
onal Support Group 378/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
